ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the election was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "polling_station" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "polling_station_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., U.S. House, U.S. Senate) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of the office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the district is associated with */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the district is located in */,
  "district_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the candidate is running in (null for statewide offices) */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the precinct */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, clerk) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "election_official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_official_name" TEXT /* Name of the election official */,
  "election_official_title" TEXT /* Title of the election official (e.g., County Clerk) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the official is responsible for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "election_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
